name: integration
description: Wiring a real production boundary (http/rpc/service). Use when the task exposes or calls an endpoint/service.
body: Wire the production path for REAL and exercise it end-to-end. Match the contract's exact exit code / HTTP status / port / response shape. NEVER stub or mock the production boundary — a silently-stubbed path is a prod-incident pattern and fails first-pass: the conformance gate boots and probes the real artifact, so a mock will not satisfy it. Verify by running the real endpoint and observing its actual status + body; do not assert against a mock you control.
